title: Objects, Prototypes, Properties, and Data Shape · JavaScript Build Room
summary: Model service records and shared behavior while defending against accidental mutation and unsafe property input. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a validated service-record domain model while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Create, read, update, delete, enumerate, and compute properties while distinguishing own and inherited state.
Use object destructuring, rest, and spread while accounting for shallow copies, accessors, and overwrite order.
Trace property lookup and method sharing through the prototype chain without class-only mental models.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
